name: scroll_to_section
description: Scroll the portfolio to a section when the visitor asks to see or go to it (e.g. 'show me your experience', 'go to work', 'how can I reach you').

section_id.description: Which section to scroll to. 'work' is the ElevenHacks projects showcase.

name: open_project
description: Open the detail view for a specific ElevenHacks project when the visitor asks to see it.

slug.description: Slug of the project to open.

name: go_home
description: Return to the top of the page and close any open project (e.g. 'go back', 'start over').
